$comment: Schema built from [BPM docs](https://github.com/cloudfoundry/bpm-release/blob/9d556975335b6fbfe4c8e5a729ac02d1faba542b/docs/config.md and https://github.com/cloudfoundry/bpm-release/blob/9d556975335b6fbfe4c8e5a729ac02d1faba542b/docs/config.md), [adapter.go](https://github.com/cloudfoundry/bpm-release/blob/9d556975335b6fbfe4c8e5a729ac02d1faba542b/src/bpm/runc/adapter/adapter.go), and [OCI Runtime Spec Configuration docs](https://github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/blob/6999a89a76a0329f440d5740497bedb9dd431297/config.md).

processes.description: A top-level listing of all of the processes in your job.

executable.description: The path to the executable file for this process.

args.description: The arguments which will be passed to the `executable` of this process.

env.description: Any additional environment variables to be included in the environment of this process.

workdir.description: The working directory for this process.

capabilities.$comment: Maps to ambient, bounding, inheritable, and permitted capabilities
capabilities.description: The list of [capabilities](https://man7.org/linux/man-pages/man7/capabilities.7.html) (without `CAP_`) which should be granted to this process.

ephemeral_disk.description: Whether or not an ephemeral disk should be mounted into the container at `/var/vcap/data/<job>`.

persistent_disk.description: Whether or not an persistent disk should be mounted into the container at `/var/vcap/store/<job>`.

additional_volumes.description: A list of additional volumes to mount inside this process. The paths which can be used are restricted.

shutdown_signal.description: The first signal to send to the process when trying to shut it down.

Hooks.description: The hook configuration for this process.

pre_start.description: The startup hook must finish with time to spare before the `monit start` timeout (default: 30s)

memory.$comment: [Conversion to bytes](https://github.com/cloudfoundry/bpm-release/blob/9d556975335b6fbfe4c8e5a729ac02d1faba542b/src/bpm/runc/adapter/adapter.go#L270) is [handled by bytefmt](https://github.com/cloudfoundry/bytefmt/blob/dfc835280bacc8272adec8bf10a6edbff68a1d82/bytes.go#L104-L121). The coefficient must be greater than zero. Leading zeros are permissible.
memory.description: The memory limit to apply to this process.

open_files.$comment: Maps to POSIX `RLIMIT_NOFILE` soft and hard limits.
open_files.description: The number of files this process is allowed to have open at any one time.

processes.description: The number of processes which this process is allowed to have running at any one moment (inclusive of the main process).

core_file_size.$comment: Maps to POSIX `RLIMIT_CORE` soft and hard limits.
core_file_size.description: The maximum size (in bytes) of a core dump file. Set to enable core dump generation for post-mortem debugging.

writable.description: Whether or not this volume is writable by the process.

allow_executions.description: Whether or not executable files can be executed from this volume.

mount_only.description: Whether or not BPM should just mount this directory rather than creating (if it doesn't exist) and chowning a backing directory too.

VolumeUnrestricted.description: An unrestricted list of additional volumes to mount inside this process.

shared.description: Whether or not BPM should share the mount (internal mountpoints are visible in all namespaces).

Unsafe.description: The unsafe configuration for this process.

privileges.description:
Whether or not this process should execute with increased privileges.
This removes some the safeguards which surround a BPM process:
- Runs as user `root` and group `root`
- Grants a larger list of privileges (taken from Docker's privileged list)
- Allows new privileges to be gained
- Removes seccomp limitations
- Removes masked and readonly paths (still applies to volumes and `/var/vcap/{data,store})
- All mounts have their `nosuid` option removed

host_pid_namespace.description: Use the host's PID namespace inside the container.
